description_short: Providence sits at the head of Narragansett Bay with nor'easter, winter storm, and hurricane exposure.
description_long: Located at the head of Narragansett Bay in northern Rhode Island, Providence faces nor'easters, winter storms, and Atlantic hurricanes — most famously the 1938 Hurricane that devastated New England. Providence County is served by NWS Boston/Norton (office code BOX) within forecast zone RIZ002 (Northern Providence).
